changes.description: Baseline run with original verbose skill (identical to skills/sql/SKILL.md)

Reduced skill from ~435 lines to ~95 lines. Removed PostgreSQL, MySQL, backup/restore, and migration script sections. Focused on SQLite-only patterns: schema design, CSV import, query patterns (joins, aggregations, window functions, CTEs), normalization workflow, and JSON output guidance. Added composite primary key and foreign key examples matching task requirements.
